title: India at Glasgow 2026 schedule tracker
scope: India-specific competition sessions based on the 126-athlete ministry-approved contingent.
timezone: All tracker times are converted to Indian Standard Time (IST). Glasgow is on BST; IST is 4 hours 30 minutes ahead.
scheduleEdition: Official Glasgow 2026 master event schedule published 13 July 2026.
